description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped stone with a rugged, natural appearance. Its surface is predominantly brown with subtle variations in tone, featuring undulating textures and visible striations that suggest natural weathering. One side of the stone is relatively flat, while the other sides are more angular and uneven, giving it a distinctive, organic silhouette. There are small patches of lighter coloration, possibly mineral deposits or remnants of paint, and a visible label or marking on one face. The stone's surface is matte and rough, with a tactile quality typical of sedimentary or weathered stones found in urban landscaping. Its overall form and finish make it suitable as an obstacle or decorative barrier in parks, sidewalks, or urban green spaces.
description: A rugged, brown stone with an irregular, weathered surface and subtle color variations, featuring a flat side and visible markings.
description_view_0: This view shows the stone's elongated profile with a prominent flat face and a pointed end, highlighting its rough, brown surface.
description_view_1: From this angle, the stone appears more compact, with the label or marking clearly visible on the near face and pronounced surface undulations.
description_view_2: This perspective emphasizes the stone's broad, uneven top surface and the curvature of its sides, with the label partially visible.
description_view_3: Here, the stone's angular rear and side contours are most apparent, showing a mix of flat and sloped surfaces with natural texturing.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Subtle, irregular striations and mottling with some lighter patches and a visible label; no artificial carvings or regular patterns.
attribute_weathering: Rough and naturally weathered with minor surface discoloration, indicating moderate exposure to outdoor elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with soil, gravel, or planted areas, providing a visual and physical contrast to paved or built surfaces.
